user_query: I am planning a surprise party for my friend and I want to send invitations to all the guests through WhatsApp. Can you create a group, add me as an admin, and provide me with the invite link?

TaskList.description: Create a new WhatsApp group for the surprise party.
Add the user (yourself) as an admin of the WhatsApp group.
Generate an invite link for the WhatsApp group.
Send invitations to guests using the generated WhatsApp invite link.
